description:
Native extension for deterministic TDD savepoint evidence.

The extension exposes tools for planning, running, and querying TDD evidence
while projecting normalized records into `.omegon/evidence`.
name: omegon_tdd_savepoint

description: Project identity recorded in an evidence manifest.

description: Capture branch, head, dirtiness, staged state, and scoped diff hash.

description: Compute the scoped worktree diff hash used for stale-pass detection.
name: current_diff_hash

description: Generator identity recorded in an evidence manifest.
name: EvidenceGenerator

name: from
